insights.text: Target role: AI Product Manager — A strong current market signal (demand and growth) for AI Product Manager in the product function.
Advance from a Advanced readiness base — Your present-state readiness is at the Advanced band. Consolidating Cognitive Development is the highest-leverage next move on your current track.
Consider the research industry — The research industry shows strong aggregate role demand and growth in the catalog. (general)
Consider the data function — The data function shows strong aggregate demand and growth across catalog roles. (general)
Future-resilient role: GenAI Engineer — GenAI Engineer combines high projected growth with lower automation exposure — a more future-resilient target. (general)
Alternative direction: GenAI Engineer — GenAI Engineer sits in the data function — a different direction from your current track, with healthy market signal. (general)
